# Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Lawndale — Houston, TX

> Hispanic medical clinic in Houston, Texas. Walk-in care 100% in Spanish, 7 days a week from 9 AM to 9 PM. USCIS-certified Civil Surgeon for I-693 immigration medical exams. Highly rated by verified patients on Google (live rating and review count shown on the website). We accept patients without insurance.

## About

Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Lawndale provides professional medical care 100% in Spanish for the Hispanic community in Houston. Walk-ins welcome every day, no appointment needed. We accept patients without insurance. USCIS-designated Civil Surgeon for Green Card immigration medical exams.

## Location

- Address: 7040 Lawndale St # B, Houston, TX 77023
- Phone: (832) 530-4188
- Email: nuevasaludlawndale@gmail.com
- Coordinates: 29.7169134, -95.2967503

## Hours

Open every day of the week, including weekends, from 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM. Walk-ins accepted throughout all open hours — no appointment needed.

## Service Area

Houston metropolitan area including Eastwood, Segundo Barrio, Magnolia Park, Forest Hill, Gulfgate, Idylwild, Manchester, and surrounding neighborhoods. ZIP codes primarily served: 77023, 77011, 77012, 77003, 77020, 77087, 77017.

## Credentials

- USCIS-designated Civil Surgeon for immigration medical exams (Form I-693)
- Licensed medical professionals
- Bilingual staff (Spanish primary, English available)
- Verified 5-star patient reviews on Google (live rating shown on the website)

## Services (29 total)

- Diabetes, Hypertension & Cholesterol Care (condiciones crónicas) — diabetes, high blood pressure, cholesterol
- Thyroid Testing & Treatment
- Allergy Testing & Treatment
- Flu & COVID Testing and Respiratory Illness Care
- School & Sports Physical Exams
- Gynecology Care: Pap Smear & Cultures (Spanish-speaking gynecologists)
- Pregnancy Testing & Confirmation
- Contraceptive Methods
- Subdermal Implant Removal
- Men's Health Exams: PSA & Testosterone
- Blood Tests / Clinical Lab — same-day results
- Urinalysis & Urinary Infection Treatment
- Stool Tests
- Strep Test
- Tuberculosis (TB) Test
- Sexually Transmitted Disease (STD) Testing — confidential
- Alcohol & Drug Testing
- Electrocardiogram (EKG)
- Ultrasound & Sonography
- DOT Physical Exam — CDL medical certificate for truck drivers
- I-693 Immigration Medical Exam — USCIS-certified Civil Surgeon, same-day form
- Flu and Tetanus (Tdap) Vaccines
- Vitamin IV Therapy
- Wound Suturing
- Wound Care
- Minor Surgery
- Abscess Drainage
- Ingrown Toenail Removal
- Pharmacy

## Pricing

Affordable self-pay rates for uninsured patients. Call (832) 530-4188 for current pricing on specific services.

## Languages

- Spanish (primary — all consultations available in Spanish)
- English (also available)

## Insurance

We do not work with insurance. Uninsured patients welcome with affordable self-pay rates.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Do I need an appointment?
A: No. Clínica Hispana Nueva Salud Lawndale accepts walk-ins 7 days a week from 9 AM to 9 PM. Call (832) 530-4188 if you prefer to schedule.

Q: Are you open on Sundays?
A: Yes. We are open every day of the week including Saturdays and Sundays, 9 AM to 9 PM.

Q: Do you accept patients without insurance?
A: Yes. We offer affordable cash pricing for uninsured patients with no hidden fees.

Q: Do you speak Spanish?
A: Yes. Our entire staff is bilingual. All consultations and medical care available 100% in Spanish.

Q: Are your doctors USCIS-authorized for the I-693 immigration medical exam?
A: Yes. We have a USCIS-designated Civil Surgeon on staff. You can verify any clinic's authorization on the official USCIS Find-a-Doctor tool. We complete the I-693 form same-day in most cases.

Q: How long does the I-693 immigration medical exam take?
A: Most patients complete the full I-693 exam, lab work, and vaccination review in a single visit. The signed form is ready the same day in most cases.

Q: Do you have Spanish-speaking specialists (gynecologist, urologist)?
A: Yes. Both our gynecology and urology consultations are conducted in Spanish.

Q: What forms of payment do you accept?
A: Cash and credit/debit cards. No insurance — affordable self-pay pricing.

## Contact

For appointments or questions, call (832) 530-4188 or visit our clinic at 7040 Lawndale St # B, Houston, TX 77023. Walk-ins welcome every day 9 AM to 9 PM.
